rows.label: tev068501_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev068501_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Da Girhi about the Larsian children.

rows.label: tev068501_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev068501_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Da Girhi if anything is troubling her.

rows.label: tev068501_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Da Girhi about materials.

rows.label: tev068501_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Da Girhi about recent developments.

rows.label: tev068501_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Da Girhi about Valley of Oblivion.

rows.label: tev068501_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask Da Girhi about recent developments.

rows.label: tev068501_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Da Girhi about recent developments.

rows.label: tev068501_SEL0081
rows.name: Ask Da Girhi about recent developments.

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0001
rows.name:
When we served the Growth, we
were ever able to keep the
bellies of our children full.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0002
rows.name:
But since arriving on Mira,
their bellies have roiled.
Now they worsen by the day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0003
rows.name:
I have come to suspect that there was
some sort of toxin in the rations we
had been receiving from the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0004
rows.name:
They were trying to bind us to their
servitude by leaving us unable to
survive without their medicines.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0009
rows.name:
We have no ammunition and little food,
and our Dolls stand ravaged and frail.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0010
rows.name:
But our mettle as Larsians has not been
marred, and we continue to fight as comrades
who have survived countless battles![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0011
rows.name:
So long as we have that, we have nothing
to fear from the Growth—no matter how
many pursuers they send our way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0016
rows.name:
You have provided us with a great bounty
of supplies. Allow me to repay your
generosity with some fruitful intelligence.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0017
rows.name:
Light-speed jet fins are among the most
precious of materials, and even the Growth
have sought them with much fervor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0018
rows.name:
These items can be acquired on
occasion by besting the aetrygons
that dwell at King's Falls.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0019
rows.name:
I imagine that your human artificers could use them
to make most spectacular contraptions. Should you
have a free moment, you must strive to gather a few.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0021
rows.name:
It seems we will begin receiving
shipments of ammunition and
provisions from the humans soon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0022
rows.name:
When they arrive, my brothers
and I can finally head out to
settle things with the beast.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0023
rows.name:
The medicines you provided have
already restored our children's
vigor. We are in your debt for this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0028
rows.name:
At Lake Basel to the north, there
dwells a ceto that appears only
during meteor showers at nighttide.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0029
rows.name:
It is said that it circles above the
lake, feasting upon anything and
everything that catches its eye.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0030
rows.name:
Should you best it, you might
be able to knock some rare
treasure out of its corpse![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0031
rows.name:
But make no mistake—this is a
dangersome beast. Too formidable
even for the likes of us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0032
rows.name: You, however, may well stand a chance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0033
rows.name:
In the battle with the queen jacul, neither
my elder brother's blade nor my younger brother's
strike proved effective by themselves.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0034
rows.name:
What proved decisive was the knowledge
of her weak point that you afforded us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0035
rows.name:
It is a lesson Vi Sezha has been preaching
for years. From this day forward, I shall
cease charging blindly into the fray...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0036
rows.name:
Instead, I will strive to discern
my foe's weakness and engage it
with more disciplined strikes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0041
rows.name:
A warrior named Ge Jewhe went
brashly forward to brave the
perils of Cauldros alone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0042
rows.name:
I never imagined that she could
possibly return safely from such
folly. Yet return she did![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0043
rows.name:
Vi Sezha had been awaiting her return as
patiently as a loyal bride. I have never seen
her so happy! What a joyous relief this is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0048
rows.name:
I still cannot believe that Ge
Jewhe has fallen in battle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0049
rows.name:
As a fellow Larsian warrior, I should
celebrate her honorable death.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0050
rows.name:
But when I see the sorrow
in Vi Sezha's eyes...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068501_MSG0051
rows.name:
Well, I know that I could never replace
Jewhe, but as a friend, I wish to support
Sezha through this trying time.[ST:wait ]
